title: MoKo Swimming Kickboard for Kids Adults, Cartoon Swimming Training Aid Pool Exercise Equipment, Kickboard for Swimming Training for Swimming Beginner
features: GOOD TO SWIM EXCERCISE: The design with arc can reduce the resistance in the water so that the forward speed can be faster, which is helpful to the swimming exercise.
SAFE MATERIAL: Made of premium PE material, it is an ideal equipment for swimming beginners and swimming training. And it is also safe to kids.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Ergonomic professional design helps improve waist strength, which makes it be more suitable for exercising the lower section of the body. Kids can learn to swim more effective and have more fun in the water with using so helpful kickboard.
CARTOON PATTERN: The swimming kickboard with cute cartoon pattern and bright color can attract kids' attention, and the helps develop the interest of learning swimming.
MULTIPURPOSE: The swimming kickboard is not only a useful swimming equipment, but also can be a gift for festival, birthday, and even can be an award for school classroom competition.

Previous page A variety of patterns for you to choose from, and provide you with endless fun. Ergonomic cutouts and ribbed edges facilitate learning to swim and keeping balance in the water. Improve the efficiency of swimming and facilitate swimming exercise. Lightweight enough and suitable for little ones and adults. Next page 1 Adorable Cartoon Pattern 2 Easily Grip 3 Good Helper for Swimming 4 Product Size What is the suitable weight range of the kickboard? This kickboard is suitable for people of 15-45kg. Can I sit on it? It is not a bodyboard or a floating raft on the water. Even if it is very light, you can't sit on it or lie on it. It is only used when practicing swimming. It is very suitable for kicking exercises. What is the size of the product? The product size is 16.14 x 11.22x 1.18 inches. Is its material safe? Made of premium PE material, it is an ideal piece of equipment for swimming beginners and swimming training. And it is also safe for children.
